name: GitHub
description: Search repos, create issues, manage PRs directly from BrowseCortex
longDescription: Connect GitHub to BrowseCortex and let the AI manage your entire dev workflow. Search repositories, read files, create issues, open pull requests, review code, and manage workflows—all from the side panel.
author: BrowseCortex

apiKeyConfig.label: GitHub Personal Access Token
apiKeyConfig.helperText: Create a token with 'repo' and 'read:user' scopes

examplePrompts: Search for open issues labeled 'bug' in my repos
Create a pull request for my latest branch with a summary
Summarize what changed in the last 5 commits on main
Find all repos I contributed to this month
Review this pull request and suggest improvements
Close issue #42 with a summary message
